fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Cockpit server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Collection Name or ID
fields.description: Name of the collection to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: JSON Data Fields
fields.description: Whether new entry fields should be set via the value-key pair UI or JSON

fields.label: Entry Data
fields.description: Entry data to send as JSON

fields.label: Entry Data
fields.description: Entry data to send (JSON object; supported keys: field, field.name, field.value)
